_meta: P0 + P1 backend strings. Translations by Thedeergod — Chinglish OK for v1, will be proofread later.

common.auth_failed: Auth failed — please check {provider} API key
common.rate_limited: {provider} rate limited, please try again later
common.rate_limited_with_retry: {provider} rate limited, retry in about {retry_secs} seconds
common.url_scheme_invalid: URL must start with https:// (rejects http://, file://, javascript:, etc). Current value: {url}
common.no_credential: No credentials configured (set in Settings panel)

provider.unconfigured_key: API key not configured for {provider} (set in Settings)
provider.schema_unknown_hint: Schema not recognized — add candidate field names in Settings → Schema overrides
provider.minimax_403: No permission to access MiniMax usage API (HTTP 403)

xiaomi.unconfigured_both: API key or Dashboard cookie not configured (set in Settings)
xiaomi.unconfigured_key: Xiaomi API key not configured (set in Settings)
xiaomi.unconfigured_cookie: Xiaomi Dashboard cookie not configured (set in Settings)
xiaomi.api_key_unauthorized_hint: Xiaomi API key unauthorized (HTTP 401) — current usage API only allows dashboard cookies. Use Cookie or both (401 auto-falls back to Cookie path)
xiaomi.cookie_invalid_hint: Cookie expired or invalid — re-login at platform.xiaomimimo.com → DevTools → copy new Cookie
xiaomi.cookie_empty: Dashboard cookie is empty (Settings → Xiaomi → Dashboard Cookie)
xiaomi.cookie_format_invalid: Cookie format invalid (contains illegal character {ch}). Please re-copy from browser DevTools Application → Cookies (no line breaks)
xiaomi.schema_unknown_hint: Response missing plan_total_token / compensation_total_token / month_total_token (schema changed? Add new names in Settings → schema_overrides)

zhipu.auth_failed_hint: Auth failed — Zhipu GLM API key invalid (note: no Bearer prefix; CN/EN keys are not interchangeable)

stepfun.token_unconfigured_hint: StepFun Oasis-Token not configured (copy from stepfun.ai → DevTools → Cookies → Oasis-Token)
stepfun.token_invalid_hint: StepFun Oasis-Token invalid or expired (re-login at stepfun.ai and paste new token)

claude_official.cookie_invalid_hint: Claude sessionKey cookie invalid or expired (claude.ai login session expires after ~8h — re-extract)
claude_official.missing_five_hour_seven_day: Claude response missing five_hour / seven_day field

custom.rate_limited: CustomSource rate limited, please try again later
custom.auth_failed: Auth failed — please check API key
custom.unconfigured_key: API key not configured (set in Settings)
custom.newapi_data_missing: NewApi template: data.quota / data.used_quota missing or non-numeric
custom.balance_path_invalid: Balance template: path '{path}' invalid or non-numeric
custom.custom_path_no_match: Custom template: no paths matched any value

notification.xiaomi_cookie_expired_body: Your Xiaomi MiMo cookie has expired (~8h). Click the floating window to re-login.
notification.claude_session_expired_body: Your Claude sessionKey has expired. Open Settings → claude_official → paste new sessionKey.

commands.region_invalid: Invalid region: {other} (must be cn / global / custom)
commands.field_unknown: Unknown field identifier: {other} (expected api_key or cookie)
commands.display_mode_unknown_xiaomi: Unknown Xiaomi display mode: {other} (expected all / plan_only / total_only)
commands.xiaomi_region_unknown: Unknown Xiaomi region: {other} (expected cn / sgp / ams)
commands.interval_too_small: Refresh interval cannot be less than 10 seconds (avoids provider rate limit)
commands.threshold_invalid: Color thresholds must satisfy 0 < t0 < t1 < t2 < 100 (actual {t0} / {t1} / {t2})
commands.color_key_unknown: Unknown color tier key: {other} (only ok / cyan / warn / alert supported)
commands.config_unrecognized: config.json format unrecognized (neither new nor legacy format): {path}
commands.custom_url_invalid: base_url must start with http:// or https://
commands.custom_method_invalid: method must be GET or POST, current: {method}
commands.custom_duplicate: display_name '{name}' already used by another custom source
commands.custom_path_must_start_with_slash: Custom source path must start with '/' (prevents URL confusion)

extra.custom_spec_required: When provider_id == 'custom', the custom field is required
extra.custom_only_for_custom_provider: custom field can only be modified on provider_id == 'custom' instances

cli.dump_no_credentials: [dump] No credentials configured. Set them in the GUI Settings panel first.

xiaomi_login.cookie_extraction_failed: Cookie extraction failed — after multiple retries still could not find expected dashboard cookies. Please check: 1) login completed successfully; 2) you are on the platform.xiaomimimo.com dashboard page
xiaomi_login.cookies_not_found: No Xiaomi dashboard cookies found ({count} total, expected {expected}: {wanted}). Actually available: {available}
xiaomi_login.cookies_incomplete: Extracted cookies incomplete (api-platform_serviceToken={has_service_token}, userId={has_user_id}). Both must be present to call the dashboard API — not saved, original cookie kept. Please log in again.
